name: Paintball Arena Bern
purpose: Indoor paintball arena in Mamishaus bei Bern offering paintball sessions, team events, bachelor parties, birthday parties and group events on over 2000m²
tone: Energetic, action-oriented, informal German (du-form), emphasizes fun, adrenaline, and team experiences
